title: medicago turbinata subvar. neglecta
intro: Medicago turbinata subvar. neglecta, also known as a variant of the perennial legume Medicago turbinata, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high saponin content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Medicago turbinata subvar. neglecta include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for cardiovascular and gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves or roots, which can then be used as teas, infusions, or supplements.
